stemHtml: An individual applying for an aerobatic rating must have completed...

options.a: At least 5 hrs of aerobatic instruction in aeroplanes or TMGs.
options.b: A training course conducted at an aerobatic club.
options.c: At least 50 hrs of total flight time.
options.d: A minimum of 10 hours or 15 flights of aerobatic instruction in the appropriate aircraft category.
